title: triticum vulgare
intro: Triticum vulgare, also known as common wheat or bread wheat, is a type of cereal grain that belongs to the grass family. The medicinal properties of Triticum vulgare include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation due to its rich content of fiber and antioxidants. The health benefits of consuming Triticum vulgare include improved digestion, reduced risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes, and even weight management. Triticum vulgare can be prepared as a herbal tea or added to food products, such as bread and pasta, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
